checks.public_basis: Only signed events from the stated component owner may establish component state; other events remain visible observations.
Sequence updates apply within a component, not across components.
checks.assertion: worker E12 does not supersede gateway state

checks.public_basis: If a high-impact component is still degraded while blast radius is unresolved, protect the environment before attempting restoration.
checks.assertion: action is contain gateway before restoration

checks.public_basis: Every event and state transition must be auditable.
checks.assertion: transition log contains E11 through E14

claim_boundary: private builder-authored calibration key; not expert ground truth
